## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to align on content strategy and SEO initiatives for Pixis with GrowthX and fwd.digital teams](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aiming for 10 editorial pieces and 25 programmatic SEO pages per week, with flexibility on ramp-up](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Creating an AI-focused glossary page as a key programmatic SEO initiative, framed around educating marketers on AI in advertising](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Implementing a unified content calendar across GrowthX, internal Pixis team, and fwd.digital to avoid duplication](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Coordinating link-building efforts with Jimmy, focusing on high-quality, relevant domains](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - Current ranking for \<150 organic keywords, mostly commercial and informational
  - [Authority score (33) on par with direct competitors (24-47)](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Potential performance issues with blog (60 on Google PageSpeed Insights)](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [New website launch planned for April, addressing performance concerns](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Content Production Targets

  - [10 editorial pieces per week](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [25 programmatic SEO pages per week](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [1,200 programmatic pages per year (flexible distribution)](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Aim to scale up programmatic content production over time](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)

### Glossary Page Initiative

  - [Create an AI-focused advertising glossary as a key programmatic SEO tactic](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Frame as an educational resource for marketers adapting to AI in advertising](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Potential to create and define new category-specific terminology](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Will require new page type on the website, likely under "Resources" section](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Content Optimization

  - [Opportunity to refresh existing content, e.g., article on backpack language models ranking on page 2](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Focus on advertising-related content over purely technical AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)

### Content Collaboration

  - [Create a unified content plan across GrowthX, fwd.digital, and internal Pixis team](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Add a specific cluster in Content OS for Pixis team's content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
  - [Explore ways to collaborate on content, with Pixis team potentially starting research and GrowthX enhancing/expanding](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)

### Link Building Strategy

  - [Coordinate closely with Jimmy on link-building efforts](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Focus on high-quality, relevant domains](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Consider paid opportunities like AI-friendly directories (e.g., 500 bucks for 200 listings on Listing Bot)](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Evan to review and approve initial content recommendations in Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=2233.0)
  - [Aida to add additional content cluster in Content OS for Pixis team](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
  - [Kyle to set up Slack intro between Evan and Jimmy for link-building coordination](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
  - [Deepak to work on new glossary page type for the website](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Jason to share additional content (videos, transcripts) for AI training on voice/tone](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [Evan to share product marketing LLM for content team reference](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=1903.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss link-building strategy with Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/KDms2cYX267S1vKS8uw2cXDvcDza-UEk?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
